definitions.text: To put (something) in a place where it will be out of sight or harder to discover.
examples: He hides his magazines under the bed.
The father hid the gift behind him.

definitions.text: To put oneself in a place where one will be out of sight or harder to find.
To beat with a whip made from hide.
A unit of land and tax assessment of varying size, originally as intended to support one household with dependents. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
